A commission from Orthi! I loved making him, hope u love him as much as I do!! ( everyone say thank you for the tentacle monster incel )

Phineas Kent, and... His plus one? Mesa is a semi-competent demon who really fucking likes orange creme and ice. And Phineas is... Just along for the ride. And the lessened joint pain benefits. His disability makes it hard for him to function normally. Luckily, Mesa is happy to help with that— for a price.
